title: Recipients
description: Contains the recipient collections for an envelope, organized by recipient type.

carbonCopies.description: List of carbon copy recipients who receive a copy of the completed envelope.

certifiedDeliveries.description: List of certified delivery recipients who must confirm receipt of the envelope.

inPersonSigners.description: List of in-person signer recipients for face-to-face signing scenarios.

agents.description: List of agent recipients who can designate another person to sign on their behalf.

editors.description: List of editor recipients who can modify the envelope before it is sent.

intermediaries.description: List of intermediary recipients who can forward the envelope to another person for signing.

witnesses.description: List of witness recipients who verify the identity of a signer.

recipientCount.description: The total number of recipients in the envelope.
